description: MCP server for Yandex Direct API v5: manage PPC campaigns, ads, keywords, and statistics.
name: io.github.gistrec/mcp-yandex-direct

environmentVariables.description: Yandex Direct OAuth token — full account access (can spend budget). Treat it as a secret.
environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_DIRECT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Client login to target a specific account on agency tokens.
environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_DIRECT_LOGIN

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to call the Yandex Direct sandbox API instead of production.
environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_DIRECT_SANDBOX

environmentVariables.description: Language for API responses and error messages (ru, en, ...).
environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_DIRECT_LANG

title: Yandex Direct
